takes.event_basis: Q1 FY27 Earnings on 2026-05-20 (after market close). <cite index="48-1">NVDA earnings confirmed for Wednesday 05/20/2026 After Market</cite>.
takes.thesis: <cite index="34-6">Analysts at Oppenheimer reiterated outperform rating ahead of earnings next week</cite>. <cite index="49-19,49-20">Management had highlighted $500B worth of high-confidence demand tied to Blackwell and Rubin through 2026; CEO Jensen Huang said he expects at least $1T of opportunity through 2027</cite>. <cite index="24-8">CEO Huang's participation in US-China summit signals potential export pathway recovery</cite>, removing prior overhang on China sales guidance.
takes.risks: <cite index="46-10">Technical picture suggests period of consolidation or pullback increasingly likely before or after earnings</cite>; valuation already priced high on 26x forward earnings.

takes.event_basis: Q1 FY27 Earnings on 2026-05-22 (after market close). CEO Huang's participation in US-China summit signals potential export pathway recovery; hyperscaler capex spending on track for $725B+ combined annually.
takes.thesis: <cite index="31-8">CEO Huang's participation in US delegation summit with China suggests potential pathway for advanced chip exports, removing regulatory headwinds on Chinese demand.</cite> Combined with sustained AI capex momentum and <cite index="6-9">hyperscaler combined 2026 spending projections tracking near $725 billion, above earlier expectations,</cite> NVIDIA positioned for earnings beat and raised guidance.
takes.risks: Geopolitical detente could reverse if US-Iran tensions escalate; inflation surprise may prompt Warsh Fed to signal rate-hold policy extending into H2 2026.

takes.event_basis: Apple chip manufacturing agreement reportedly finalized (WSJ/Bloomberg, May 9–12, 2026). Formal contract execution and production roadmap expected Q2–Q3 2026.
takes.thesis: <cite index="14-5,14-6">Deal would mark major breakthrough for Intel as it rebuilds semiconductor manufacturing; companies said to have been in discussions over year, with formal agreement reached in recent months</cite>. <cite index="20-26">Intel may be getting major business boost, and Trump administration may score political victory after pushing vocally about importance of local US chip manufacturing</cite>.
takes.risks: Stock valuation already up 377% YTD; execution risk on first production timelines (18–24 months); margin structure unclear on entry-level Apple products.
